MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: Elise Yvonne Rousseau, represented by counsel Stephen J. Sherman, Present
Respondent/Plaintiff: Biganeh Madjlessi, Present

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Appeal as to judgment on plaintiffs claim entered 9-21-17 against appellant/defendant.

Elise Yvonne Rousseau, Appellant testifies on her own behalf
Stephen J. Sherman, Counsel testifies on behalf of Appellant, Elise Yvonne Rousseau
Appellant examined by counsel.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Biganeh Madjlessi, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Group Exhibit A: marked as respondents' exhibits 1 - 9

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
